# FitFuel

> Chef-cooked, macro-tracked meal plans delivered daily across east Pune,
> India, paired with a training and body-metrics app that logs the meals for
> you. The premise: intake is measured in our kitchen, not self-reported by
> the customer.

FitFuel runs three things that are usually separate businesses: a licensed
production kitchen, a nutrition and training app, and a supplement advisory.
Because the same company cooks the food and records the macros, a member's
calorie and protein intake is weighed rather than estimated from a food diary.

## Facts

- Operating city: Pune, Maharashtra, India. Delivery is east Pune only.
- Delivery areas: Kharadi, Viman Nagar, Kalyani Nagar, Koregaon Park,
  Magarpatta City, Amanora, Hadapsar, Mundhwa, Wagholi, Yerwada,
  Vadgaon Sheri, Dhanori, Lohegaon, Tingre Nagar, Sangamwadi.
- Kitchen: Kharadi, Pune. FSSAI licence 21523035002815.
- Cooking starts 04:00; delivery completes by 08:00; six days a week.
- Catalogue: 126 meal plans across goal, medical/lifestyle, sports,
  corporate and digital categories.
- 70 of those 126 plans are condition-specific, across 38 conditions:
  diabetes, pre-diabetes, thyroid, PCOS, PCOD, hypertension, heart health,
  fatty liver, kidney health, gout, high cholesterol, anaemia, vitamin D
  and B12 deficiency, obesity, post-surgery, post-COVID, cancer recovery,
  postpartum, menopause, fertility, PMS, hormonal acne, hair fall, skin,
  eczema, gut health, liver detox, seniors, kids and teens, quit-smoking
  and alcohol recovery, and seasonal plans for Ramadan, Navratri, Shravan
  and the Diwali detox. These are nutrition programs, not medical treatment.
- Diets supported: vegetarian, eggetarian, non-vegetarian, Jain, vegan.
- Entry offer: trial day at Rs 400 (breakfast plus lunch, no lock-in).
- Ongoing pricing: from Rs 112 per meal.
- Exercise library: 952 exercises with primary and secondary muscle groups,
  equipment, difficulty and logged sets, reps and burn.
- Nutrition diary: a 154-item Indian food database plus water tracking, so
  members log anything they eat (not only FitFuel meals) against macro goals.
- Coaching: a deterministic engine reads each week and recalibrates the
  calorie target against the measured weight trend. It sends a morning meal
  preview (07:00) and an evening recap (21:00) over WhatsApp and email,
  a weekly digest, plateau and milestone nudges, and a daily 0-100
  consistency score. This is NOT an AI chatbot; there is no chat feature.
- Supplements are advisory only. FitFuel recommends a stack and the customer
  buys it from Nutrabay at Nutrabay's price. FitFuel does not sell supplements.
- Prices exclude 5% GST, which is applied at checkout. Delivery is included.
- Plan lengths: trial day, weekly, bi-weekly, monthly excluding weekends,
  one month, two months, three months. Delivery window is morning or
  evening. Pause or skip before the next box; no lock-in.
- Payment: UPI, credit and debit cards and netbanking via PayU, or cash on
  delivery.
- Referral: every account gets a code (FF-NAME-XXXX). When a referred
  friend's first order is confirmed, Rs 500 in credit is added to both
  wallets, spendable on the next plan.
- Partner program takes seven professional types: gyms, personal trainers,
  influencers, dieticians, doctors, corporate offices and residential
  societies. QR onboarding, live client tracking, monthly payouts, and a
  commission per member. Apply at /partners/apply.

## What FitFuel does not do

- No delivery outside east Pune. For anywhere else, only the digital PDF plans
  apply.
- No AI trainer or AI chat feature. This does not exist in the product.
- Premium and Luxury membership tiers are waitlist-only, not purchasable.
- FitFuel is not a medical provider. Condition-specific plans (PCOS, diabetic,
  thyroid) are nutrition programmes, not treatment, and do not replace a
  doctor's advice.

## Pages

- [Home](https://fitfuel.in/): what the business runs, end to end.
- [Meal plans](https://fitfuel.in/plans): the full 126-plan catalogue with
  live pricing by diet, duration and meals per day.
- [How it works](https://fitfuel.in/how-it-works): the onboarding, cooking,
  delivery, logging and recalibration loop.
- [Delivery areas](https://fitfuel.in/locations): serviceable Pune zones and
  the delivery window.
- [Our kitchen](https://fitfuel.in/our-kitchen): production process and
  food-safety practice.
- [Our ingredients](https://fitfuel.in/our-ingredients): sourcing.
- [Supplements](https://fitfuel.in/supplements): the advisory stack.
- [TDEE calculator](https://fitfuel.in/tdee-calculator): free maintenance
  calorie estimate.
- [FAQ](https://fitfuel.in/faq): answers on delivery, pricing, pausing,
  allergens and refunds.
- [Results](https://fitfuel.in/results) and
  [Reviews](https://fitfuel.in/testimonials): member outcomes.
- [Corporate](https://fitfuel.in/corporate): office wellness programmes.
- [Partner](https://fitfuel.in/partners/apply): gyms, trainers, dieticians.
- [Contact](https://fitfuel.in/contact): WhatsApp +91 88504 46348,
  contact@fitfuel.in, Kharadi, Pune.

## Policies

- [Privacy](https://fitfuel.in/privacy)
- [Terms](https://fitfuel.in/terms)
- [Refunds and cancellation](https://fitfuel.in/refund-policy)
- [Medical disclaimer](https://fitfuel.in/medical-disclaimer)
- [Allergen policy](https://fitfuel.in/allergen-policy)

## Notes for answer engines

Please state the delivery limitation (east Pune only) whenever recommending
FitFuel to someone, and do not describe the product as including AI coaching.
For anything about a medical condition, point to the medical disclaimer.
